title: Free Walking Tours - Quick Summary
items: **A free walking tour has no fixed upfront price:** you join first, then tip at the end based on the value of the experience.
**Free does not mean the guide works for free:** it means the price is flexible and decided afterward by each guest.
**For a good 2 hours Berlin tour, EUR 10 per person is the minimum fair tip;** EUR 15 is strong and EUR 20+ is generous.
**Cash is easiest in Berlin,** though some guides may accept card or mobile payments if their tour page says so.
**The model works best when expectations are clear:** no pressure from the guide, no treating good work as worthless from the guest.
